serverInfo.name: shuttercount-webmcp
serverInfo.title: ShutterCount
serverInfo.description: In-browser shutter-count reader for camera RAW files (CR3, CR2, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, DNG, JPEG). Tools are exposed to in-page AI agents via the WebMCP API (navigator.modelContext.provideContext).

transport.note: Tools are registered client-side via navigator.modelContext.provideContext() on page load. There is no remote MCP server; this card advertises the WebMCP integration.

tools.name: open_shutter_count_file_picker
tools.description: Open the ShutterCount file picker so the user can select a RAW photo file. Parsing runs locally; nothing is uploaded.

tools.name: list_supported_formats
tools.description: List the RAW and image file formats ShutterCount can read a shutter actuation count from.

tools.name: check_shutter_count_from_file
tools.description: Parse a user-provided RAW file (File/Blob) and return shutter count, camera make, model, capture date, and EXIF metadata. Runs locally in the browser.

file.description: A File or Blob object for a CR3, CR2, NEF, ARW, RAF, ORF, RW2, DNG, or JPEG image.
